name: Gitea
description: Git with a cup of tea! Painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service, including Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry and CI/CD

parameters.name: Environment Variables
parameters.default:
GID=1000
GITEA_DB_NAME=gitea
GITEA_DB_TYPE=sqlite3
GITEA_DOMAIN=localhost
GITEA_HTTP_PORT=3000
GITEA_ROOT_URL=http://localhost:3000
GITEA_SSH_PORT=2222
GITEA_VERSION=latest
GITEA__database__DB_TYPE=sqlite3
GITEA__database__HOST={{ POSTGRES_HOST }}:5432
GITEA__database__NAME=gitea
GITEA__database__PASSWD={{ POSTGRES_PASSWORD }}
GITEA__database__USER=postgres
GITEA__server__DOMAIN=localhost
GITEA__server__HTTP_PORT=3000
GITEA__server__ROOT_URL=http://localhost:3000
GITEA__server__SSH_DOMAIN=localhost
GITEA__server__SSH_PORT=2222
POSTGRES_USER=postgres
UID=1000
USER_GID=1000
USER_UID=1000
parameters.description: Environment variables to substitute in initial_command.

parameters.name: Rootfs Storage
parameters.description: Proxmox storage for the container rootfs

parameters.name: Volume Storage
parameters.description: Proxmox storage ID for data volumes
